cards.fullText:

item is in play.

discard a card or banish this item.

cards.name: Darkwing Tower
cards.fullText:
EVIL VANQUISHED During your turn, whenever an opposing Villain
character is banished, you may ready a character here. If you do, they
can't quest for the rest of this turn.
